Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.vintage" AS vintage, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 5) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/94d51ba5db3e06b148e15de51322fc99eeb38a3d1099ce5daa3658edd11c2d94/08bbf13a-127d-4240-a643-2d54a87d182b/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
